title: rhodocalyx cinereus
intro: Rhodocalyx cinereus, also known as the "cinereous rose madder", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhodocalyx cinereus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Rhodocalyx cinereus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
